title: Hollywood Wine Pros Pick the Rosé Bottles Worth Popping All Summer Long
summary: From crisp, low-alcohol sippers to lush, fruit-forward pours, top wine experts reveal the salmon-hued California bottles they recommend for every sun-soaked gathering.

title: Janie Sell, Tony-Winning Star of ‘Over Here!,’ Dies at 86
summary: She performed with two of The Andrews Sisters in that, with the Smothers Brothers in ‘I Love My Wife’ and in several other Broadway musicals.
